title: Haricot Bean Bowl
description: A hearty and comforting bowl filled with charred haricot beans, aerated vegetables, and a hint of norwegian spices.

ingredients.name: Aerated Vegetables (such as carrots and zucchini)
Norwegian Spices (such as cardamom and allspice)
Chopped Fresh Herbs (such as parsley and dill)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the charred haricot beans, aerated vegetables, norwegian spices, salt, and pepper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the mixture and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs and serve hot.
